editor.title: Title
editor.noImagesDesc: Images will appear here after pasting or uploading in content
editor.unsavedChanges:
You have unsaved changes.

Click 'OK' to discard and close,
Click 'Cancel' to continue editing.
editor.noHistoryDesc: History will appear here after editing and saving
editor.coverAuto: Auto-detect: Using first image from content
editor.noCover: No cover (default color block will be shown)
editor.coverPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-detect content images
editor.pasteImageHint: (Ctrl + V to paste screenshots or images)

settings.title: Settings
settings.exportJSONDesc: Human-readable format for backup and transfer
settings.exportDBDesc: SQLite file, can be restored directly
settings.autoLoadMoreDesc: Automatically load when scrolling to bottom
settings.quickAddDefaultDesc: Default category when clicking 'Quick Add' button
settings.imageSaveModeDesc: How images are saved when pasting
settings.vacuumDesc: Clean up fragmented space, improve performance
settings.vacuumConfirm: Are you sure you want to optimize the database? This may take a few seconds.
settings.autoOpenBrowserDesc: Automatically open browser window on startup
settings.importMDDesc: Single or batch .md import (images must be in same folder)
settings.clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This cannot be undone.
settings.cardOpenModeDesc: Default display mode when clicking a card

categories.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this category? Notes in this category will be set to 'Note'.

orphanImages.title: Orphan Image Management
orphanImages.description: The following images are not referenced by any note
orphanImages.clickToScan: Click 'Scan Orphan Images' to start checking

originalImages.title: Original Image Cleanup
originalImages.scanDesc: Find original images with thumbnail backups
originalImages.warning: After deletion, image paths in notes will be changed to thumbnails. This cannot be undone.
originalImages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete all original images? This cannot be undone, but image paths in notes will be changed to thumbnails.

brokenImages.title: Fix Broken Paths
brokenImages.scanDesc: Find paths where original is deleted but thumbnail exists
brokenImages.desc: These images' originals no longer exist, but thumbnails are available. Click fix to automatically update paths to thumbnails.
brokenImages.confirmFix: Are you sure you want to fix all broken image paths?

promptBuilder.title: Prompt Builder
promptBuilder.subtitle: Structured Prompt Assembler v2
promptBuilder.editedPromptDesc: Edited prompt (this version will be saved)
promptBuilder.chaosLevel1: Order Mode: Randomize Subject + Style only
promptBuilder.chaosLevel3: Chaos Mode: Full random + Dual style + Custom options priority
promptBuilder.appendToExisting: Append to existing description (instead of replacing)
promptBuilder.noOptionsYet: No inspiration words for this dimension yet
promptBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to generate, e.g., A woman in a red dress standing by the seaside at sunset...
promptBuilder.negativePlaceholder: Elements to exclude, e.g., blurry, low quality, watermark...
promptBuilder.editPlaceholder: Edit and refine your prompt here...

chaos.level1: Order Mode: Randomize Subject + Style only
chaos.level3: Chaos Mode: All random + Dual style + Custom options priority
